name: CardVille 1.0.57 Word Card UI Mobile Layout
notes: Applies selected word card UI assets, cleans baked checker backgrounds to alpha PNG, adapts mobile card and answer layouts for larger text, and replaces sort-random shuffles with Fisher-Yates shuffleCopy.
label: Premium word card UI + mobile card readability
description: Selected CardVille_WordCard_UI assets are processed into RGBA PNG/WebP, word gameplay uses the new frames/back art, action controls move into a safe bottom rail, Math/English answer cards are enlarged, and card-game shuffle/performance checks are added.
